problems.answer: Apply the counting sort on C,O,M,P,U,T,I,N,G and is it stable and in-place.

explanation.text: Determine the trade-off: use extra memory space to decrease the overall running time of the algorithm.
For Hashing: map keys to indices using a hash function and handle collisions with chaining or open addressing.
For Counting Sort: use a frequency array to count occurrences, achieving O(n) time with O(k) space.
